meta.title: PicoMUTX — Build and Deploy AI Agents Safely Without Hiring a Developer
meta.description: PicoMUTX helps founders, operators, and small teams build, deploy, and run AI agents safely — with a shipped lesson corpus, starter deploy path, and grounded support.

hero.title: Build and deploy AI agents
hero.subtitle: PicoMUTX gives you a safe, guided path to a working AI agent — whether you are starting from scratch, fixing an agent that is not working, or trying to avoid another expensive mistake.
hero.meta: Shipped academy · Starter deploy path · Grounded support

items.0: For founders, operators, and small teams

problem.title: The problem is not the idea.
problem.titleLine2: It is everything that happens after it.
problem.body: Most people do not get stuck because they lack ambition. They get stuck because building an AI agent still feels like entering a world designed by engineers, for engineers.

0.label: "I want an AI agent, but I don't know where to start."
0.body: There are too many tools, too many opinions, and too many people assuming you already know the basics. The gap between "I have an idea" and "I have something working" feels larger than it should.

1.label: "I already tried — and got stuck."
1.body: You made progress, hit a wall, and had nobody to ask who could actually help. The idea is sitting in your backlog instead of creating value.

2.label: "I spent money, and it still isn't working properly."
2.body: Maybe you hired someone. Maybe you paid for tools. Now you are not just uncertain — you are skeptical.

3.label: "I don't want to deploy something I can't trust."
3.body: An agent that gives the wrong answer, behaves unpredictably, or creates hidden costs is not an asset. It is a liability.

platform.title: Where AI agents go from “interesting idea” to “working system.”
platform.body: PicoMUTX is a guided platform for people who want to build and run AI agents safely — without needing to become full-time engineers. It gives you the structure, support, and safeguards that are usually missing when people try to do this alone. Instead of assembling everything from scratch, you move step by step: from idea to implementation, from confusion to clarity, from prototype to something you can actually use.

0.title: Step-by-step implementation paths
0.body: Follow structured paths based on what you are trying to build — from customer support agents to internal automations. No generic theory. No endless searching.

1.title: Guided support when you get stuck
1.body: When something breaks or becomes unclear, you do not have to figure it out alone. PicoMUTX keeps momentum alive instead of letting projects die in confusion.

2.title: Built-in safety from day one
2.body: Cost awareness, visibility, and guardrails matter. You always know what your agent is doing, what it is costing, and when something needs attention.

3.title: Live expert touchpoints
3.body: Some things are too nuanced for static documentation. Real guidance moments designed to help you unblock faster and make better decisions.

who.title: PicoMUTX is not for everyone.
who.notForYouTitle: This is not for you if…

forYou.0: You want to build an AI agent but don't want to depend entirely on developers
forYou.1: You've tried before and got stuck halfway
forYou.2: You already spent money on tools or implementation and still don't trust the outcome
forYou.3: You want a practical path, not more theory
forYou.4: You want support while building, not only after something goes wrong

notForYou.0: You are looking for a shortcut with zero learning
notForYou.1: You already run a mature enterprise agent stack and need complex governance infrastructure
notForYou.2: You want entertainment, trends, or hype more than execution
notForYou.3: You are not ready to change how the business actually operates
notForYou.4: You expect AI to replace judgment, leadership, or accountability

beforeAfter.title: What changes when you stop figuring it out alone

0.before: You have an idea, but no clear path
0.after: You have a structured way forward

1.before: You waste time jumping between tools, docs, and tutorials

2.before: You get stuck and lose momentum
2.after: You get support before the project dies

3.after: Your agent gets built and put to work

beforeAfter.close: The goal is not to “learn AI someday.” The goal is to get your agent live — safely, clearly, and with less friction.

earlyAccess.title: PicoMUTX is open with a shipped academy, starter deploy path, and grounded support.
earlyAccess.body: Start with the academy, move through the starter checklist, and use the support lane when you need help with the next concrete step.

benefits.0: Browse the shipped Pico academy right now
benefits.1: Use the starter deploy checklist for first-run setup
benefits.2: Sign in to access Pico control and plan-tied features
benefits.3: Get grounded support tied to the shipped lesson corpus
benefits.4: Escalate to a human when the corpus is not enough

faq.title: Questions people usually have before joining

0.q: Do I need to know how to code?
0.a: No. PicoMUTX is built for people who want to build useful AI agents without needing deep technical expertise.

1.q: What if I've already tried and failed?
1.a: That is exactly one of the people this is for. PicoMUTX is designed to reduce the confusion and fragmentation that usually cause people to stop halfway.

2.q: What kind of agents can I build?
2.a: Practical ones — the kind that save time, support operations, improve workflows, and help businesses run better. The focus is usefulness, not toy demos.

3.a: Yes. Pico is open now. You can start with the academy and starter path today, then sign in when you want plan-tied features and support history.

4.a: PicoMUTX is better suited to founders, operators, and small teams who want a guided way to build and deploy AI agents. Larger enterprise governance needs belong to the broader MUTX ecosystem.

finalCta.title: Your agent does not need to stay an unfinished idea.
finalCta.body: You do not need more tabs open. You do not need another tutorial. You need a clearer path to something that works. Pico is open now with a shipped academy, starter path, and grounded support.
finalCta.formSubline: Start with the checklist, browse the academy, or reach out when you need help.
finalCta.formCtaMeta: Shipped academy · Starter deploy path · Human help when needed
